recent_no_vcs_projects.name: pico-celery
recent_no_vcs_projects.summary: Async-first Celery integration for Pico-IoC. Enables defining Celery tasks as async methods on IoC-managed components, with automatic discovery, dependency injection, and container-scoped execution.
